_meta.description: Universal HBP Serialization Contract Registry — SDUI-4 Renderer Paradigm. The single source of truth for all integer-key MessagePack mappings across the entire horAIzon 2.0 monorepo. The sdui_spec block defines the 17 V4 primitives and their complete behavior/content key registry. The log_entry_contract block defines the canonical cross-language structured log entry schema — all emitters (Rust, TypeScript, Dart, Python) must conform to this schema when sending to the Governor log aggregator. Run tools/sync_contracts.py after any change to regenerate language-specific constant files.
